name: GOLFTEC Oxnard
address: 2100 Outlet Center Dr Suite B330, Oxnard, CA 93036
about: GOLFTEC Oxnard is a golf training facility that provides personalized instruction, club fitting, and practice services using advanced technology. Their approach is built on data, utilizing OPTIMOTION motion measurement technology and high-speed video analysis to help expert coaches identify swing issues and guide students through customized lesson plans. The facility offers a structured improvement process, starting with a Swing Evaluation to create a personalized game plan, followed by lessons and practice memberships designed to build better mechanics and lead to tangible results on the course.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION technology and high-speed video analysis for precise swing feedback
Personalized improvement plans and game strategy based on a Swing Evaluation
Access to launch monitors and training bays with coach-designed practice memberships for accelerated progress

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. Students can also purchase custom-fit clubs directly from the pro shop after a fitting session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify food and drink policies, so it is recommended to contact the location directly for details on outside food or beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 virtual holes depends on the simulator software and simulator bay availability, which are not specified on the website. For details on simulator usage, it's best to contact the location directly.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC welcomes juniors and offers coaching programs for youth golfers, making it a suitable environment for young players looking to improve their game.
